mapper.select: SELECT fid, fname, fdescription, fcreator_id, fmodifier_id, fcreate_date, fmodify_date, fstaff_number, fphoto, faddress, fmobile, femail, ftel, f_jjlxr, f_jjlxrdh, f_sfzh, f_sfzh_front, f_sfzh_reverse_side, f_ora_date, f_ora_text, f_ora_date1, f_ora_combo, f_ora_text1, f_xb, f_cty_date, f_zzrq, f_nl, f_bw, f_hkszd, f_mz, f_lzrq, f_sbrq, f_sbje, f_dkyl, f_dkyliao, f_dksy, f_jsdj, f_ldht, f_bxrq, f_jbgz, f_gwgz, f_jx, f_ywm, f_jltcd, f_mltcd, f_ymtcd, f_bmjt, f_peuu_imagefileserver_qtr, f_peuu_date_83g, f_peuu_imagefileserver_apv, professional_certificate, f_peuu_imagefileserver_tzk, f_peuu_imagefileserver_ca9, f_peuu_imagefileserver_uky, f_peuu_imagefileserver_dvn, fbaseProperty, salesman_id FROM sys_employee WHERE fstaff_number = #{fstaffNumber}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_employee ( fid, fname, fdescription, fcreator_id, fmodifier_id, fcreate_date, fmodify_date, fstaff_number, fphoto, faddress, fmobile, femail, ftel, f_jjlxr, f_jjlxrdh, f_sfzh, f_ora_date, f_ora_text, f_ora_date1, f_ora_combo, f_ora_text1, f_xb, f_cty_date, f_zzrq, f_nl, f_bw, f_hkszd, f_mz, f_lzrq, f_sbrq, f_sbje, f_dkyl, f_dkyliao, f_dksy, f_jsdj, f_ldht, f_bxrq, f_jbgz, f_gwgz, f_jx, f_ywm, f_jltcd, f_mltcd, f_ymtcd, f_bmjt, f_peuu_imagefileserver_qtr, f_peuu_date_83g, f_peuu_imagefileserver_apv, f_peuu_imagefileserver_tzk, f_peuu_imagefileserver_ca9, f_peuu_imagefileserver_uky, f_peuu_imagefileserver_dvn, fbaseProperty, professional_certificate, f_sfzh_front, f_sfzh_reverse_side ) VALUES
( #{item.fid}, #{item.fname}, #{item.fdescription}, #{item.fcreatorId}, #{item.fmodifierId}, #{item.fcreateDate}, #{item.fmodifyDate}, #{item.fstaffNumber}, #{item.fphoto}, #{item.faddress}, #{item.fmobile}, #{item.femail}, #{item.ftel}, #{item.fJjlxr}, #{item.fJjlxrdh}, #{item.fSfzh}, #{item.fOraDate}, #{item.fOraText}, #{item.fOraDate1}, #{item.fOraCombo}, #{item.fOraText1}, #{item.fXb}, #{item.fCtyDate}, #{item.fZzrq}, #{item.fNl}, #{item.fBw}, #{item.fHkszd}, #{item.fMz}, #{item.fLzrq}, #{item.fSbrq}, #{item.fSbje}, #{item.fDkyl}, #{item.fDkyliao}, #{item.fDksy}, #{item.fJsdj}, #{item.fLdht}, #{item.fBxrq}, #{item.fJbgz}, #{item.fGwgz}, #{item.fJx}, #{item.fYwm}, #{item.fJltcd}, #{item.fMltcd}, #{item.fYmtcd}, #{item.fBmjt}, #{item.fPeuuImagefileserverQtr}, #{item.fPeuuDate83g}, #{item.fPeuuImagefileserverApv}, #{item.fPeuuImagefileserverTzk}, #{item.fPeuuImagefileserverCa9}, #{item.fPeuuImagefileserverUky}, #{item.fPeuuImagefileserverDvn}, #{item.fbaseProperty}, #{item.professionalCertificate}, #{item.fSfzhFront}, #{item.fSfzhReverseSide} )

update.foreach: UPDATE sys_employee SET fname = #{item.fname}, fdescription = #{item.fdescription}, fcreator_id = #{item.fcreatorId}, fmodifier_id = #{item.fmodifierId}, fcreate_date = #{item.fcreateDate}, fmodify_date = #{item.fmodifyDate}, fstaff_number = #{item.fstaffNumber}, faddress = #{item.faddress}, fmobile = #{item.fmobile}, femail = #{item.femail}, ftel = #{item.ftel}, f_jjlxr = #{item.fJjlxr}, f_jjlxrdh = #{item.fJjlxrdh}, f_sfzh = #{item.fSfzh}, f_ora_date = #{item.fOraDate}, f_ora_text = #{item.fOraText}, f_ora_date1 = #{item.fOraDate1}, f_ora_combo = #{item.fOraCombo}, f_ora_text1 = #{item.fOraText1}, f_xb = #{item.fXb}, f_cty_date = #{item.fCtyDate}, f_zzrq = #{item.fZzrq}, f_nl = #{item.fNl}, f_bw = #{item.fBw}, f_hkszd = #{item.fHkszd}, f_mz = #{item.fMz}, f_lzrq = #{item.fLzrq}, f_sbrq = #{item.fSbrq}, f_sbje = #{item.fSbje}, f_dkyl = #{item.fDkyl}, f_dkyliao = #{item.fDkyliao}, f_dksy = #{item.fDksy}, f_jsdj = #{item.fJsdj}, f_ldht = #{item.fLdht}, f_bxrq = #{item.fBxrq}, f_jbgz = #{item.fJbgz}, f_gwgz = #{item.fGwgz}, f_jx = #{item.fJx}, f_ywm = #{item.fYwm}, f_jltcd = #{item.fJltcd}, f_mltcd = #{item.fMltcd}, f_ymtcd = #{item.fYmtcd}, f_bmjt = #{item.fBmjt}, f_peuu_imagefileserver_qtr = #{item.fPeuuImagefileserverQtr}, f_peuu_date_83g = #{item.fPeuuDate83g}, f_peuu_imagefileserver_apv = #{item.fPeuuImagefileserverApv}, f_peuu_imagefileserver_tzk = #{item.fPeuuImagefileserverTzk}, f_peuu_imagefileserver_ca9 = #{item.fPeuuImagefileserverCa9}, f_peuu_imagefileserver_uky = #{item.fPeuuImagefileserverUky}, f_peuu_imagefileserver_dvn = #{item.fPeuuImagefileserverDvn}, fbaseProperty = #{item.fbaseProperty}, professional_certificate = #{item.professionalCertificate}, f_sfzh_front = #{item.fSfzhFront}, f_sfzh_reverse_side = #{item.fSfzhReverseSide} WHERE fid = #{item.fid}
